titleStmt.title: SII 18.247: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 247. CHAUḌADĀNPUR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Back of a slab set up in Muktēs11vara temple.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 1187, Raktākshi, Pushya ba. 15, Sunday, Śravaṇanakshatra, ardhōdaya, corresponding to A.D. 1265, January 18, Sunday on which day there was a lunar eclipse.

It registers a grant of land and house sites to Śivadēva by Mahāpradhāna Sarvādhikāri Dēvarasa of Toragale, under orders from king Mahadēvarāya. The gift land was obtained from Maiḷadēvi the mother of the Gutta chiefs Guttarasa, Hiriyadeva and Jōyideva. S11ivādēva is here referred to as Guttānvaya-Rājaguru. Gaṅgana-mattaru is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya . © mudadiṁ pā
lisugurvvipadamaṁ caṁdrārkkatārakaṁ
baraṁ girijāvadanāṁbujātamitraṁ tridaśēśvara mu
ktanātha dēvara dēvanu . svasti śrīmatu yādava
rāyanārāyaṇaṁ prauḍhapratāpacakravartti śrī
vīramahadēvarāyana besadiṁ . svasti śrīmanu
mahāpradhānaṁ sarvvādhikāri toragaleya dēvarsa
ru kaṭakadiṁ baṁdu . svasti śrīmadārūḍhavīrabrati śiva
yōgasiddha śivadēvarige sāṣṭāṁgapraṇāmapūrvvakaṁ
biṁnapaṁgeyidaniṁteṁdū . voṁdu grāmava koḍu nīnendaṁ
yadukulanrupōttamaṁ mahadēvaṁ . yiṁdada patikarisalu
bēkendoḍe śivayōgasiddha nagutiṁtendanu . tribhuvanaveṁma
du paḻciya prabhutvavēṁ ślyāghyave yadalladu māṇendabhayaka
ra siddhanenalū śubhalakṣaṇa dēvarāja maraḷiṁteṁdaṁ . v® . dēvaru ko
ṭṭaḍolladiralappudu dēvaṇi māḍi siddhiyiṁ śrīvibhavaṁgaḷiṁ manu
jalōkadadhīśvararittaḍolladeṁdeviralappuduttamapadārtthacayaṁga
ḷanalladātmajarbhāvakarārttati(ri)ttaḍadanollevenippidu dharmmavappude . Eṁ
damṛtōdaraprabhava dēvanṛpaṁ nuḍidoṁdu vākyadoḻu baṁdakhiḷāgamārttha
nelasirddudu śāstrada sarvvasampadaṁ sandudu vaidikārttha voḍanirddudu dha
rmmada permevettudēnanndapeneṁdu taṁnoḷanumānisutaṁ śivadēvareṁ
daparu . Ārādhisuvaṁ nīnolidārādhisikoṁbanīśvaranuvēnānuvunārādhisu
kayikoṁbaṁ vīrēśvaranendu sidda nēmisalolaviṁ . Ā dēvarājaṁ . Uttara dakṣiṇa paścima
duttuṁgāsanada rāyarārādhise varavitta śivadēvaraṁ śrīguttānvayarāja
guruvanārādhisidaṁ . Adeneṁdaḍe . svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ
Ujjayanīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ caṁdraguptānvayaṁ guttakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa kadana
pracaṁḍa pannirbbara gaṁḍa maṁḍaḷikabhayirava śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaraṁ śrīpsa(spa)rśaliṁ
ga gaḷaganāthadēvaśrīpādapadmārādhakarappa guttarsadēva . hiriyadēva . jōyi
dēvaṁgaḷū . Avara tāyvarappa maiḷādēviyara kayyalu dhāreya koṁḍu guttoḷalā
ḍa prabhugāvuṁḍugaḷanoḍaṁbaḍisi . śakavarṣa 1187 raktākṣisaṁvatsarada puṣya ba 15
Ādivāra śravaṇanakṣatra byatīpātaṁgūḍidarddhōdaya puṇṇyatithiyalli dēvarsaru
māḍidārādhaneya kramaveṁteṁdaḍe . guttoḷala baḍagavoladalli yere ga
ṁgana mattaru 1 . hiriya keṟeya keḷage gadde gaṁgana kaṁba 10 . mane 1 . tu
ḍike 1 . hoṁnavattiya mūḍavoladalli yere gaṁgana mattaru 1 . mane 1 .
tuḍike 1 . yūlūra keṟeyiṁ baḍagalere gaṁgana mattaru 1 . mane 1 . tu
ḍike 1 . Ulihaḷḷiyalli vūra mūdadeseyalli kaṁba 50 teṁkadeseyallu kaṁba 50
Aṁtalli yere gaṁgana mattaru 1 mane 1 tuḍike 1 . hāhanūra paḍuvavo
lanalli yere gaṁgana mattaru 1 mane 1 negeyūra volaThere is space for three letters in between ra and vo.
nalli yere gaṁgana mattaru 1 mane 1 tuḍike 1 . Eladuttūra mūḍaṇa hola
nalli Ere gaṁgana matta 1 mane 1 tuḍike 1 . kaṁnavaḷḷiya baḍaga kolanalli ye
re gaṁgana mattaru 1 mane 1 tuḍike 1 . Āgaḍiya baḍaga koladalli yere gaṁgana
matta 1 tuḍike 1 mane . hādarigēriya volanalli yere gaṁganaThere is space for three letters in between ya and vo.
mattaru 1 mane 1 tuḍike 1 . Iṁtī hattu grāmaṁgaḻalli dēvarsaru śrī śi
vadēvarige samārādhaneya māḍida dharmmava Ācaṁdrārkkaparyyaṁtaṁ
sarvvanamasyavāgi guttoḷalnāḍa prabhugāvuṁḍugaḷu salisuvaru .
Digital edition of SII 18.247 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
